one_time_description: Government of Canada settlement payment (1909 Surrender Claim) of $150,000,000 received and transferred into Muscowpetung Sovereign Wealth Fund
economic_notes: Muscowpetung Sovereign Wealth Fund established from amalgamation of Muscowpetung Legacy Trust and 1909 Surrender Claim settlement. Annual income distribution based on 4% of average market value. The Skunk's Corner convenience store (GBE) operating with $2.14M revenue. Portfolio investment in Keseechiwan Holdings LP (8.3% interest). Kief Cannabis Company Ltd investment fully impaired.
notes: Major one-time item: $150M Government of Canada settlement (1909 Surrender Claim) dominates financials. Settlement funds placed into new Muscowpetung Sovereign Wealth Fund (MSWF). MSWF draws of $68.28M recorded as repayable revenue. Accumulated surplus swung from -$16.3M deficit to +$7.5M surplus due to settlement. Long-term debt repayment of $72.2M in year largely due to settlement-related debt. Fully consolidated subsidiary: Muscowpetung Saulteaux Business Developments Ltd. GBE on modified equity: Muscowpetung Ki-Pih-Cheen and Mah-Jahn Convenience Store Inc. (The Skunk's Corner). The Skunk's Corner changed year-end from Aug 31 to Mar 31; 19-month period financials used. Current portion of long-term debt in prior year was $15.1M. Financial statements signed February 25, 2025.
